verdict.note: browser YATU from worktree vite :5199 — 4-item menu on node right-click (default menu suppressed), focus follows, Esc/outside-click/anywhere-right-click dismissal, info→popup, new-session/delete seed the New Session prompt

Right-click session-console (overlay from session 990cc544) → menu shows the session item below a divider; clicking it routes to #/sessions/990cc544… (opens the console). No-overlay node (footprint) shows only the 4 verbs, no divider.

DIVERGENCE reproduced (real NodeContextMenu, live board data): overlay session item shows the stable LABEL '老问题了，右键一个 spec node…' (raw launch-prompt truncation via sessionName) while the board row for the SAME session shows the live headline '统一 spec node 右键菜单中的 session 名称解析'. Two different names for one session — the overlay reached the wrong name-door.

FIXED: NodeContextMenu now renders sessionHeadline (the shared display door), so the overlay session item reads '统一 spec node 右键菜单中的 session 名称解析' — IDENTICAL to the board row for the same session. Both surfaces now call sessionHeadline on the same sessions array → identical by construction. The stable-handle door was also renamed sessionName→sessionHandle so the wrong door can't be grabbed by reflex again.
